---
title: "Slade"
---

## Slade

**Type:** place

### About

Slade, near Cornwood in Devon, was the home of CMY\'s cousins the Pode family.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
